summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Logistics AI document processing system. Found critical Gemini API model configuration issue blocking Q&A and extraction functionality. Document upload and UI components working correctly.

critical_bugs.issue: Gemini model 'gemini-1.5-flash' not found - should be 'gemini/gemini-1.5-flash' with provider prefix
critical_bugs.impact: Blocks all Q&A and structured extraction functionality
critical_bugs.error_details: litellm.NotFoundError: models/gemini-1.5-flash is not found for API version v1beta

critical_bugs.issue: Invalid file upload returns 500 instead of 400 status code
critical_bugs.impact: Incorrect HTTP status for client error handling

ui_bugs.issue: data-testid attributes missing before document upload

integration_issues.issue: Backend 500 errors not properly displayed to user - no error messages shown in UI

passed_tests: Document upload functionality works (PDF, DOCX, TXT)
Document parsing and chunking (2 chunks created from sample)
Document status indicator appears after upload
UI layout and 3-panel design implemented correctly
Phosphor icons implemented (7 SVG icons found)
Error handling for invalid document IDs (404 responses)
Question input and send button functionality
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix Gemini model name from 'gemini-1.5-flash' to 'gemini/gemini-1.5-flash' in qa_service.py and extraction_service.py. Add missing data-testid attributes for doc-status-indicator and extract-json-button when no document is uploaded. Improve error message display in UI for backend failures.
success_percentage: Backend: 36% (4/11 tests passed), Frontend: 85% (UI loads and works, but integration fails due to backend)
